findings.description: Source has 3 h2-level headings (コードサンプル, 仕様, 内部構造・改修時の留意点) but the knowledge file consolidates everything into a single section (s1). While all content is present, the section count mismatch (3 vs 1) is notable.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 headings: 'コードサンプル' (==), '仕様' (==), '内部構造・改修時の留意点' (==)

findings.description: Attribute names 'showTitle' and 'resultSetCss' are missing from hints. These are property names from the first column of the attribute table and should be included per hints completeness rules.
findings.source_evidence: Source attribute table includes: showTitle (見出し文字列を表示するか否か, 真偽値, ○/○), resultSetCss (検索結果表示領域に適用するCSSクラス, 文字列, ○/○)
